pr.title: Improvements to split up: Dolphin support
pr.author: fjooord

summary: Path-split PR for Dolphin support matching improvements, scoped to extern/dolphin THP and sysdolphin baselib support code. Final changed-file metadata shows focused edits in THPDec, cobj, hsd_3B34, and synth. Bot reporting recorded three unmatched-item improvements, while review feedback rejected earlier particle string-data and cobj PAD_STACK-style changes that are not present in the final diff excerpt.

key_files.role: Final changed file; __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN changed from raw offset/pointer-derived mcuBuffer and repeated __THPInfo accesses toward local info access and THPFileInfoMCUBufferView typed overlay accesses.

Final changed file; final diff only removes a blank line in HSD_CObjSetUpVector. Review comments show an earlier PAD_STACK(4) attempt was criticized as not an improvement because the function had more fundamental issues.
Final changed file; hsd_803B46D4 assignment order changed by moving sp8/spC loads before jmp_buf/temp_r4 assignments.
Final changed file; HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 condition changed from unsigned arithmetic comparison to direct signed sentinel comparison against -0x10001.

Review-commented file from earlier PR revision/body scope, but absent from final changed_files metadata and final diff excerpt. Comments criticized replacing string literals with a byte-array label lbl_8040A540.

what_changed: PR split matching work from #2617 by support directory to make review easier, scoped in the body to extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp and src/sysdolphin/baselib support code.
Final changed_files metadata records four files: THPDec.c (+31/-20), cobj.c (+0/-1), hsd_3B34.c (+2/-2), and synth.c (+1/-1).

In __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN, raw pointer-derived THPCoeff** mcuBuffer from ((u8*) info + 0x10) was removed; calls now access ((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n], and repeated __THPInfo field reads were replaced with the local info pointer.
In HSD_CObjSetUpVector, final diff only removes a blank line; review evidence shows a previous PAD_STACK(4) addition was objected to and does not appear in the final diff excerpt.
In hsd_803B46D4, sp8/spC loads from lbl_804DEB88 were moved before assignments to jmp_buf and temp_r4.
In HSD_Synth_8038ADD0, condition `(u32) (x8 + 0x10000) == -1U` was rewritten as `x8 == -0x10001`.

decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 recorded 3 improvements in unmatched items: __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN +25 bytes 97.01% to 97.37%, HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 +4 bytes 98.33% to 98.82%, and hsd_803B46D4 97.31% to 97.36%.

PR body states `git diff --check origin/master...HEAD` passed for this slice and the full unsplit source branch had green CI before the directory split; it also states per-PR CI/decomp-dev is authoritative once complete.
smart_moves: Splitting the broader work by support directory reduced review scope and made path-specific matching changes easier to inspect.
THPDec.c used a local `info` pointer consistently instead of repeated `__THPInfo` reads, which makes the data flow easier to review while preserving the same base object in the excerpt.
Replacing raw byte-offset pointer derivation with a named view type for THP MCU buffers aligns with typed-field-over-pointer-math style when the offset role is understood.
Review process caught and apparently removed noisy or low-confidence changes: particle string literal replacement and cobj PAD_STACK do not appear in the final changed_files/final diff evidence.
decomp_lessons: When a raw offset access has a clear repeated role, a narrow temporary/view type can be more reviewable than casting through `(u8*)` and reusing offset arithmetic; this PR shows that pattern for THPFileInfo MCU buffer accesses in THPDec.c.
Small expression rewrites can improve matching/readability when they preserve the semantic sentinel directly, as in replacing an unsigned add-then-compare with `x8 == -0x10001` in synth.c.

String-literal-to-data-label changes are risky: reviewers explicitly called a byte-array label for particle error strings inaccurate and a regression when it stopped using the original string literal.
Stack padding should not be treated as an improvement by itself; the cobj review comment rejected a PAD_STACK addition where the function still had fundamental issues.
naming_conventions: `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` is used as a descriptive overlay/view name for the MCU buffer portion of THPFileInfo in the THPDec.c diff.

Existing address-style or temporary names such as `hsd_803B46D4`, `lbl_804DEB88`, `hsd_804D79A0`, and `temp_r4` were not semantically renamed in the final excerpt, consistent with avoiding unsupported semantic naming.

Review comments indicate `lbl_8040A540` was not an acceptable replacement name/form for ordinary particle error strings; reviewers preferred direct strings or, as an experiment, a `const char*` table only if it matched.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Typed overlay tactic: replace `(THPCoeff**) ((u8*) info + 0x10)` with repeated `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[index]` accesses in __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN.
Local-base tactic: use `THPFileInfo* info = __THPInfo` for xPixelSize, components, and quantTabs instead of repeated `__THPInfo` field references.
Statement scheduling tactic: reorder loads/assignments in hsd_803B46D4 so `sp8` and `spC` loads occur before assigning `jmp_buf` and `temp_r4`.
Expression-shape tactic: replace unsigned wraparound comparison with a direct signed sentinel compare in HSD_Synth_8038ADD0.
Rejected/removed tactic evidence: review criticized adding `PAD_STACK(4)` in HSD_CObjSetUpVector as not an improvement; final diff does not include the PAD_STACK line.

review_feedback.feedback: The byte-array label for a cluster of error strings was probably inaccurate to original developer source. Reviewer suggested trying a const char* table only as a matching experiment and otherwise reverting because direct string literals were more likely.
Changing `msg = "MCC is no initialize"` to `msg = lbl_8040A540` was called a regression due to not using the string.
Adding `PAD_STACK(4)` in HSD_CObjSetUpVector was not considered an improvement because the function had other fundamental issues.

searchable_terms: Improvements to split up: Dolphin support
follow_up_queries: Find later or related PRs touching `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` or THP MCU buffer overlay definitions to confirm whether this view became an accepted local pattern.
Search for later changes to `src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c` around `fn_80392CD8`, `lbl_8040A540`, and MCC error strings to see how the rejected string-data approach was resolved.
Search for later PRs touching `HSD_CObjSetUpVector` to identify the 'fundamental issues' mentioned in review and whether PAD_STACK was replaced by a better source reconstruction.
Search for `x8 == -0x10001` and related synth sentinel comparisons to see whether direct signed sentinel comparisons are used consistently.
Search PR #2617 and adjacent support-directory split PRs for broader context behind this slice's matching improvements.

notes: Final diff and changed_files metadata strongly support the four final changed files and concrete code edits.

PR body lists six files including particle.c and sislib.c, but final changed_files metadata and final diff include only four files. Particle appears only in review comments from an earlier revision or planned scope; sislib has no final diff evidence in this slice.
The PR body's preliminary full-branch score is explicitly not the authoritative per-PR score; only the loaded decomp-dev bot report is used for specific slice improvements.
Review comments show reviewer objections, but the loaded evidence does not include the full conversation or exact author response. Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the quoted comments.
No build, objdiff, or CI logs beyond PR body statements and the decomp-dev report were loaded.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use narrow typed overlays instead of raw offset pointer math when the data role is known
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2632, THPDec.c replaced `THPCoeff** mcuBuffer = (THPCoeff**) ((u8*) info + 0x10)` with repeated accesses through `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n]` in __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN, alongside local `info` field accesses. This is a PR-specific example supporting typed access cleanup.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Avoid replacing ordinary strings with byte-array labels without strong data ownership evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: Reviewers objected to an earlier particle.c change that introduced `static char lbl_8040A540[]` and replaced `msg = "MCC is no initialize"` with `msg = lbl_8040A540`, calling it likely inaccurate and a regression due to not using the string.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK is not an improvement by itself
accepted_candidate_records.text: A review comment on HSD_CObjSetUpVector rejected adding `PAD_STACK(4)`, saying the function had other fundamental issues. In the final diff excerpt, the PAD_STACK line is absent.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR #2632 as supporting evidence for no-string-literal-symbol-regression
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2632 review comments provide a concrete example where replacing direct particle error strings with `lbl_8040A540` byte-array storage was rejected as likely inaccurate and a regression. This can be cited as historical support for keeping ordinary strings inline unless data ownership evidence justifies a data-symbol conversion.
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded standards already contain this principle; curator may want this PR as an example/evidence citation rather than a new rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR #2632 as supporting evidence for matching-tactics-need-evidence around PAD_STACK
source_update_candidates.text: A reviewer rejected a `PAD_STACK(4)` addition in HSD_CObjSetUpVector as not an improvement because the function had other fundamental issues; final diff evidence does not retain the PAD_STACK line.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as an example that stack-padding tactics need narrow justification and should not mask unresolved source issues.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2632 final changed-file scope for Dolphin support split
source_update_candidates.text: Final changed_files metadata for PR #2632 includes `extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c`, `src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c`, `src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3B34.c`, and `src/sysdolphin/baselib/synth.c`. PR body also listed particle.c and sislib.c as scoped files, but those do not appear in final changed_files metadata in this slice.
source_update_candidates.reason: Curator may want to record the final metadata/body-scope discrepancy for future searches.

rejection_notes: Do not promote particle.c or sislib.c as final changed files from this slice; final changed_files metadata and final diff do not include them, although particle.c appears in review comments and the PR body file list.
Do not claim PR #2632 fully matched any function; decomp-dev report only shows improvements in unmatched items for three units.
Do not infer that `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` is a global accepted standard beyond this PR example without checking current source and related PRs.
Do not infer that the cobj function was improved beyond final whitespace removal; review explicitly said the PAD_STACK attempt was not an improvement.
